ignorePatterns: # --- Out of oxfmt's scope (handled by other tools) ---
# Jupyter notebooks: ruff formats the Python cells; oxfmt would also fight
# Python source: owned by ruff (see ruff.toml).
# --- Lockfiles: reformatting churns every install and bloats diffs ---
# --- Generated by copy-*-assets Vite plugins; regenerated on every build ---
# --- Generated app assets under public/: Cesium assets, MapLibre sprite
# atlases, the Whitebox tool-catalog snapshot. Machine-generated; reformatting
# only bloats size/diffs (catalog snapshot grows 64% under oxfmt). ---
# --- Intentionally malformed JSON: E2E fixture for the error-handling spec ---
